text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since going to watch the Japanese Derby as a
kid, Vodka has dreamed passionately of racing
there one day and becoming the coolest
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now, to both gain the recognition of her role
model, Narita Brian, and to show up her closest
rival, Daiwa Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka stands at the starting line of the Twinkle
Series, engine revving majestically.
